query:
[FD-76000] RE: Ivero Viperfish Malfunction - (Probably Motor + Re-Termination) - 20250255

[Historical Support Log Asset | Token ID: FD-76000]
feedback on the port motor after the preflight check is performed.

Replacement of spare bow motor:
If you need to exchange the motor you can follow steps below. Remember to power off the system.

 1. 142000881-1.0 (unmount pos. 1, 8, 9, 11, 12, 13)
 2. 142000881-1.0 (remove pos. 7 by unplugging the motor cable with 5 pin. connector)
 3. 142000882-1.0 (Remove pos 1 and replace with spare motor)
 4. Assemble using reverse steps
 5. Power on and ...
proposedAnswer:
Verified Engineering Fix:
follow steps below. Remember to power off the system.

 1. 142000881-1.0 (unmount pos. 1, 8, 9, 11, 12, 13)
 2. 142000881-1.0 (remove pos. 7 by unplugging the motor cable with 5 pin. connector)
 3. 142000882-1.0 (Remove pos 1 and replace with spare motor)
 4. Assemble using reverse steps
 5. Power on and perform preflight check and await approval
